component.name: TenshiSTEP
component.summary: NeXTSTEP/OPENSTEP-inspired Global Theme for KDE Plasma

description.p: TenshiSTEP (brand: TenshiNET) is a complete NeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP-inspired theme suite for the whole boot-to-desktop chain, in coordinated light, dark, and brushed-metal variants: Global Theme, colour scheme, Aurorae window decoration, Plasma style, Kvantum widget style, a GTK3/4 theme, an encyclopedic icon theme, SGI IRIX-idiom cursors, wallpapers, SDDM and Plymouth.

Initial release of TenshiSTEP, a NeXTSTEP/OPENSTEP-inspired KDE Plasma theme suite in coordinated light and dark variants: Global Themes, ~1000 chiselled icons, shared IRIX cursors, a compiled NeXT-style QStyle, and a boot chain (SDDM, Plymouth, rEFInd). Formerly developed as AngelLevel; renamed and versioning restarted at 0.1.0.
